creator: hawara@gmail.com

Fix: copy this patch attached below to /usr/ports/converters/iconv/files directory,
and make clean. Then make this port.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: With perl5.16-installed system,
cd /usr/ports/converters/iconv  && make
